reason: Manifest URL is a literal '...' placeholder (never a real path). Web search for the real GI-WD004 document found no independently-hosted PDF at literature.rockwellautomation.com — the only real 'wiring diagrams' document search results return is GI-WD005 (already used for entry #5, which itself contains a Bulletin 505 section on pages 25-33). Fetching the literal manifest URL (https://literature.rockwellautomation.com/.../GI-WD004_EN_E_P.pdf) returns HTTP 200 but redirects to the Rockwell Automation marketing homepage (content-type text/html, ~205KB, final_url=https://www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us.html?utm_source=literature-library-overview...). PyMuPDF (fitz) will actually open that HTML as a flowable ~40-page document (marketing copy: '2025 Sustainability Report', 'Industrial AI Designed for Optimizing Operations') rather than erroring — running the campaign against it would silently classify Rockwell's marketing homepage as a photo submission, not a real electrical print. Not run, to avoid manufacturing a false result from the wrong content. Not substituted with GI-WD005 under entry #22's id, since that would double-count a document already recorded under entry #5.
